articles.author: Robbie Gramer, Sabrina Siddiqui
articles.title: Exclusive | U.S. Pauses Visa Issuance for People Who Have Visited Ebola-Hit Countries - WSJ
articles.description: Trump administration rushes resources to Central African countries where it previously cut aid
articles.content: WASHINGTONThe U.S. is pausing visa issuance for any travelers who have been in South Sudan, the Democratic Republic of Congo, or Uganda within 21 days of planned travel to the United States as part o… [+497 chars]
